title: psychotria elongata
intro: Psychotria elongata, also known as Elongated Wild Coffee or simply Elongated Psychotria, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America and is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The leaves of the Psychotria elongata plant are used to prepare herbal teas and infusions that are believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Psychotria elongata can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and capsules, which are often used to treat a range of health conditions, including respiratory infections and skin problems.
